---
title: "tnlm"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(grid)
library(gtable)
```

```{r theme_definition}

pub_theme <- theme_minimal(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 12)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", margin = margin(r = 12)),
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", margin = margin(l = 12), angle = -90),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, colour = "grey20"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11, colour = "grey20"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.85), colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.5),
    legend.key = element_blank(),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 6, r = 12, b = 6, l = 12),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.0, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "grey30", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey90", linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(colour = "grey95", linewidth = 0.25),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 15, r = 15, b = 15, l = 15),
    # Strip (facet) styling for the multi-panel plots
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.8),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, colour = "black")
  )

col_tblm <- "#1b7837" # deep green
col_btg <- "#762a83" # deep purple
col_batch <- "#2166ac" # steel blue
col_fedbatch <- "#d6604d" # warm red

# Colours for parameter plots
col_acid <- "#e08214" # warm orange
col_base <- "#542788" # deep purple
col_pump <- "#c51b7d" # magenta-pink
col_afoam <- "#4d9221" # olive green
col_po2_line <- "#2166ac" # steel blue
```

```{r load_data}
# ── Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
batch_od <- read_excel("batch_od.xlsx")
fedbatch_od <- read_excel("fedbatch_od.xlsx")
batch_mach <- read_excel("batch_machine.xlsx")
fedbatch_mach <- read_excel("fedbatch_machine.xlsx")
glucose <- read_excel("glucose_used.xlsx")

# Rename columns for convenience
names(batch_od) <- c("time", "OD600", "lnOD", "type")
names(fedbatch_od) <- c("time", "OD600", "lnOD")
names(batch_mach) <- c("time", "stirr", "HCl", "NaOH", "pO2", "temp", "pH")
names(fedbatch_mach) <- c(
  "time", "acid", "afoam", "base",
  "subat_adj", "subat_ml", "pH", "pO2", "stirr", "pump"
)
names(glucose) <- c("time", "abs", "conc", "type")

# Compute base consumption
batch_mach <- batch_mach %>% mutate(HCl_used = HCl - HCl[1], NaOH_used = NaOH - NaOH[1])
fedbatch_mach <- fedbatch_mach %>% mutate(acid_used = acid - acid[1], base_used = base - base[1])
```

```{r plot_od_glucose_tblm_btg}
# =============================================================
# COMBINED PLOT 1 – OD + Glucose: TBLM vs BTG
# =============================================================

# Chuẩn bị dữ liệu OD
od_long <- batch_od %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch"), "Thiết bị lên men (Batch)", "Bình Erlenmeyer"),
    metric = "OD600",
    value = OD600
  ) %>%
  select(time, label, metric, value)

# Chuẩn bị dữ liệu Glucose
glu_long <- glucose %>%
  filter(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch", "BTG")) %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch"), "Thiết bị lên men (Batch)", "Bình Erlenmeyer"),
    metric = "Glucose",
    value = conc
  ) %>%
  select(time, label, metric, value)

scale_factor <- max(od_long$value, na.rm = TRUE) / max(glu_long$value, na.rm = TRUE)

# Combine and average by time/label/metric to remove multi-point zigzagging
plot_data_1 <- bind_rows(
  od_long %>% mutate(value_plot = value),
  glu_long %>% mutate(value_plot = value * scale_factor)
) %>%
  group_by(time, label, metric) %>%
  summarise(value_plot = mean(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(time)

p_combined_1 <- ggplot(plot_data_1, aes(x = time, y = value_plot, group = interaction(label, metric))) +
  geom_line(aes(colour = label, linetype = metric), linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = label, shape = metric), fill = "white", size = 2.0, stroke = 1.2, show.legend = c(colour = FALSE, shape = TRUE)) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    name = NULL,
    breaks = c("Bình Erlenmeyer", "Thiết bị lên men (Batch)"),
    values = c("Bình Erlenmeyer" = col_btg, "Thiết bị lên men (Batch)" = col_batch)
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("OD600" = "solid", "Glucose" = "dashed")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("OD600" = 21, "Glucose" = 24)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 15, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "OD600 nm",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor, name = "Nồng độ Glucose (g/L)")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)") +
  pub_theme +
  guides(
    colour = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.2, shape = NA)),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(colour = "grey30")),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(colour = "grey30", size = 2.5))
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm")
  )

ggsave("figures/plot_combined_OD_Glucose_TBLM_vs_BTG.pdf", p_combined_1, width = 8, height = 5.5, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("figures/plot_combined_OD_Glucose_TBLM_vs_BTG.png", p_combined_1, width = 8, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_od_glucose_batch_fedbatch}
# =============================================================
# COMBINED PLOT 2 – OD + Glucose: Batch vs Fed-batch
# =============================================================

# Chuẩn bị dữ liệu OD
od_fb <- fedbatch_od %>%
  mutate(label = "Fed-batch", metric = "OD600", value = OD600) %>%
  select(time, label, metric, value)
od_batch_tblm <- batch_od %>%
  filter(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch")) %>%
  mutate(label = "Batch", metric = "OD600", value = OD600) %>%
  select(time, label, metric, value)

glu_fb <- glucose %>%
  filter(type == "Fed-batch") %>%
  mutate(label = "Fed-batch", metric = "Glucose", value = conc) %>%
  select(time, label, metric, value)
glu_batch_tblm <- glucose %>%
  filter(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch")) %>%
  mutate(label = "Batch", metric = "Glucose", value = conc) %>%
  select(time, label, metric, value)

od_bf <- bind_rows(od_batch_tblm, od_fb)
glu_bf <- bind_rows(glu_batch_tblm, glu_fb)

scale_factor_bf <- max(od_bf$value, na.rm = TRUE) / max(glu_bf$value, na.rm = TRUE)

plot_data_2 <- bind_rows(
  od_bf %>% mutate(value_plot = value),
  glu_bf %>% mutate(value_plot = value * scale_factor_bf)
) %>%
  group_by(time, label, metric) %>%
  summarise(value_plot = mean(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(time)

p_combined_2 <- ggplot(plot_data_2, aes(x = time, y = value_plot, group = interaction(label, metric))) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "twodash", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text",
    x = 5.15, y = max(plot_data_2$value_plot, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
    label = "Bắt đầu cấp dưỡng", hjust = 0, size = 3.5, fontface = "italic", colour = "grey30"
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(colour = label, linetype = metric), linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = label, shape = metric), fill = "white", size = 2.0, stroke = 1.2, show.legend = c(colour = FALSE, shape = TRUE)) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    name = NULL,
    breaks = c("Batch", "Fed-batch"),
    values = c("Batch" = col_batch, "Fed-batch" = col_fedbatch)
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("OD600" = "solid", "Glucose" = "dashed")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("OD600" = 21, "Glucose" = 24)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(plot_data_2$time, na.rm = TRUE), 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "OD600 nm",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_bf, name = "Nồng độ Glucose (g/L)")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)") +
  pub_theme +
  guides(
    colour = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.2, shape = NA)),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(colour = "grey30")),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(colour = "grey30", size = 2.5))
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm")
  )

ggsave("figures/plot_combined_OD_Glucose_Batch_vs_Fedbatch.pdf", p_combined_2, width = 8, height = 5.5, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("figures/plot_combined_OD_Glucose_Batch_vs_Fedbatch.png", p_combined_2, width = 8, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot4_params_3panel}
# =============================================================
# PLOT 4 – pO2, pH, STIRR: Batch vs Fed-batch (3-panel)
# =============================================================

batch_params <- batch_mach %>%
  select(time, pO2, pH, stirr) %>%
  mutate(experiment = "Batch")
fb_params <- fedbatch_mach %>%
  select(time, pO2, pH, stirr) %>%
  mutate(experiment = "Fed-batch")

params_long <- bind_rows(batch_params, fb_params) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pO2, pH, stirr), names_to = "parameter", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    parameter = factor(parameter, levels = c("pO2", "pH", "stirr"), labels = c("pO2 (%)", "pH", "STIRR (rpm)")),
    experiment = factor(experiment, levels = c("Batch", "Fed-batch"))
  )

p4 <- ggplot(params_long, aes(x = time, y = value, group = experiment, colour = experiment)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(shape = 24, fill = "white", size = 1.8, stroke = 1.0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "twodash", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~parameter, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "right") +
  scale_colour_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Batch" = col_batch, "Fed-batch" = col_fedbatch)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(params_long$time, na.rm = TRUE), 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)", y = NULL) +
  pub_theme +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y.right = element_text(angle = -90),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines")
  )

ggsave("figures/plot4_params_batch_vs_fedbatch.pdf", p4, width = 8, height = 9, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("figures/plot4_params_batch_vs_fedbatch.png", p4, width = 8, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot6_acid_base}
# =============================================================
# PLOT 6 – Acid rate & Base rate over time (mL/h)
# =============================================================

batch_rate <- batch_mach %>%
  arrange(time) %>%
  mutate(acid_rate = c(NA, diff(HCl) / diff(time)), base_rate = c(NA, diff(NaOH) / diff(time))) %>%
  select(time, acid_rate, base_rate) %>%
  filter(!is.na(acid_rate)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(acid_rate, base_rate), names_to = "reagent", values_to = "rate") %>%
  mutate(reagent = factor(reagent, levels = c("acid_rate", "base_rate"), labels = c("Acid", "Base")), experiment = "Batch")

fb_rate <- fedbatch_mach %>%
  arrange(time) %>%
  mutate(acid_rate = c(NA, diff(acid) / diff(time)), base_rate = c(NA, diff(base) / diff(time))) %>%
  select(time, acid_rate, base_rate) %>%
  filter(!is.na(acid_rate)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(acid_rate, base_rate), names_to = "reagent", values_to = "rate") %>%
  mutate(reagent = factor(reagent, levels = c("acid_rate", "base_rate"), labels = c("Acid", "Base")), experiment = "Fed-batch")

rate_all <- bind_rows(batch_rate, fb_rate)

p6 <- ggplot(rate_all, aes(x = time, y = rate, colour = reagent, shape = reagent)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(fill = "white", size = 2.5, stroke = 1.0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "twodash", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~experiment, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "right") +
  scale_colour_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Acid" = col_acid, "Base" = col_base)) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Acid" = 22, "Base" = 23)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(rate_all$time, na.rm = TRUE), 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)", y = "Tốc độ tiêu thụ (mL/h)") +
  pub_theme +
  theme(strip.text.y.right = element_text(angle = -90), panel.spacing.y = unit(0.4, "lines"))

ggsave("figures/plot6_acid_base_rate.pdf", p6, width = 8, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("figures/plot6_acid_base_rate.png", p6, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot8_pump_afoam}
# =============================================================
# PLOT 8 – Pump (%), AFOAM (mL), pO2 (%) – Fed-batch 3-panel
# =============================================================

fb_ops <- fedbatch_mach %>%
  select(time, pump, afoam, pO2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pump, afoam, pO2), names_to = "parameter", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(parameter = factor(parameter, levels = c("pO2", "pump", "afoam"), labels = c("pO2 (%)", "Pump (%)", "AFOAM (mL)")))

p8 <- ggplot(fb_ops, aes(x = time, y = value, colour = parameter)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = parameter), fill = "white", size = 2.5, stroke = 1.0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "twodash", colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~parameter, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "right") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("pO2 (%)" = col_po2_line, "Pump (%)" = col_pump, "AFOAM (mL)" = col_afoam)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("pO2 (%)" = 21, "Pump (%)" = 22, "AFOAM (mL)" = 24)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(fb_ops$time, na.rm = TRUE), 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.02))) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)", y = NULL) +
  pub_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text.y.right = element_text(angle = -90),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines")
  )

ggsave("figures/plot8_pump_afoam_po2_fedbatch.pdf", p8, width = 8, height = 8.5, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("figures/plot8_pump_afoam_po2_fedbatch.png", p8, width = 8, height = 8.5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r advanced_kinetics}
# =============================================================
# 1. Specific Growth Rate (mu)
# =============================================================
calc_mu <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    arrange(time) %>%
    mutate(
      dt = c(NA, diff(time)),
      dlnx = c(NA, diff(log(OD600))),
      mu = dlnx / dt
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(mu), !is.infinite(mu))
}

mu_batch <- calc_mu(batch_od %>% filter(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch"))) %>% mutate(experiment = "Batch")
mu_fb <- calc_mu(fedbatch_od) %>% mutate(experiment = "Fed-batch")
mu_erl <- calc_mu(batch_od %>% filter(type == "BTG")) %>% mutate(experiment = "Erlenmeyer")

mu_all <- bind_rows(mu_batch, mu_fb)

p_mu <- ggplot(mu_all, aes(x = time, y = mu, colour = experiment)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey70") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = experiment), fill = "white", size = 2.5, stroke = 1.2) +
  scale_colour_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Batch" = col_batch, "Fed-batch" = col_fedbatch)) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Batch" = 21, "Fed-batch" = 24)) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)", y = expression("Tốc độ sinh trưởng riêng " * mu * " (" * h^{-1} * ")")) +
  pub_theme

ggsave("figures/plot_mu_vs_time.pdf", p_mu, width = 8, height = 5.5, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("figures/plot_mu_vs_time.png", p_mu, width = 8, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)

# =============================================================
# 2. Yield (Y_X/S) and Specific Glucose Consumption (q_S)
# =============================================================
# Y_X/S = (OD_max - OD_0) / (Glu_0 - Glu_final)
calc_yield <- function(od_df, glu_df, name) {
  od_max <- max(od_df$OD600, na.rm = TRUE)
  od_0 <- od_df$OD600[which.min(od_df$time)]
  glu_0 <- glu_df$conc[which.min(glu_df$time)]
  glu_min <- min(glu_df$conc, na.rm = TRUE)
  yield <- (od_max - od_0) / (glu_0 - glu_min)
  return(data.frame(experiment = name, Y_XS = yield))
}

y_batch <- calc_yield(batch_od %>% filter(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch")), glucose %>% filter(type %in% c("TBLM", "Batch")), "Batch (TBLM)")
y_erl <- calc_yield(batch_od %>% filter(type == "BTG"), glucose %>% filter(type == "BTG"), "Erlenmeyer")
y_fb_batchphase <- calc_yield(fedbatch_od %>% filter(time <= 5), glucose %>% filter(type == "Fed-batch", time <= 5), "Fed-batch (pha đầu)")

y_all <- bind_rows(y_batch, y_erl, y_fb_batchphase)

p_yield <- ggplot(y_all, aes(x = experiment, y = Y_XS, fill = experiment)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Batch (TBLM)" = col_batch, "Erlenmeyer" = col_btg, "Fed-batch (pha đầu)" = col_fedbatch)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = expression("Hệ số năng suất " * Y[X/S] * " (OD/g/L)")) +
  pub_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("figures/plot_yield_comparison.png", p_yield, width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)

# =============================================================
# 4. Cumulative Acid/Base Bar Chart
# =============================================================
cum_batch <- data.frame(
  System = "Batch",
  Acid = max(batch_mach$HCl_used, na.rm = TRUE),
  Base = max(batch_mach$NaOH_used, na.rm = TRUE)
)
cum_fb <- data.frame(
  System = "Fed-batch",
  Acid = max(fedbatch_mach$acid_used, na.rm = TRUE),
  Base = max(fedbatch_mach$base_used, na.rm = TRUE)
)

cum_all <- bind_rows(cum_batch, cum_fb) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(Acid, Base), names_to = "Reagent", values_to = "Volume")

p_cum <- ggplot(cum_all, aes(x = System, y = Volume, fill = Reagent)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.8, width = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Acid" = col_acid, "Base" = col_base)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Tổng thể tích tiêu thụ (mL)") +
  pub_theme

ggsave("figures/plot_cumulative_acid_base.png", p_cum, width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)

# =============================================================
# 5. Feed rate vs OD - Fed-batch
# =============================================================
fb_feed <- fedbatch_mach %>%
  arrange(time) %>%
  mutate(feed_rate = c(NA, diff(subat_ml) / diff(time))) %>%
  select(time, feed_rate) %>%
  filter(!is.na(feed_rate))

fb_od_clean <- fedbatch_od %>% select(time, OD600)

# Dual-axis ratio
ratio_feed_od <- max(fb_od_clean$OD600, na.rm = TRUE) / max(fb_feed$feed_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

p_feed_od <- ggplot() +
  geom_col(data = fb_feed, aes(x = time, y = feed_rate * ratio_feed_od), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = fb_od_clean, aes(x = time, y = OD600), colour = col_fedbatch, linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(data = fb_od_clean, aes(x = time, y = OD600), fill = "white", shape = 21, colour = col_fedbatch, size = 2.5, stroke = 1.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "OD600 nm",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / ratio_feed_od, name = "Tốc độ cấp dưỡng (mL/h)")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ)") +
  pub_theme +
  theme(
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(colour = "steelblue"),
    axis.text.y.right = element_text(colour = "steelblue")
  )

ggsave("figures/plot_feed_rate_vs_OD_fedbatch.png", p_feed_od, width = 8, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)

# =============================================================
# 6. DO (pO2) response zoom t=4-6h
# =============================================================
p_po2_zoom <- ggplot(fedbatch_mach %>% filter(time >= 3.8 & time <= 6.2), aes(x = time, y = pO2)) +
  geom_line(colour = col_po2_line, linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, colour = col_po2_line) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "twodash", colour = col_fedbatch, linewidth = 1.0) +
  annotate("text", x = 5.05, y = max(fedbatch_mach$pO2[fedbatch_mach$time >= 4 & fedbatch_mach$time <= 6], na.rm=TRUE)*0.95, 
           label = "Bắt đầu bơm cấp dưỡng", hjust = 0, colour = col_fedbatch, fontface="italic", size=4) +
  labs(x = "Thời gian lên men (giờ) - Focus phase", y = "pO2 (%)") +
  pub_theme

ggsave("figures/plot_po2_response_zoom.png", p_po2_zoom, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
